---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability or workflow improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

Describe the capability you want to add.

## Problem Statement

What operational or product problem does this solve?

## Proposed Outcome

Describe the desired result and how it should behave.

## Alternatives Considered

List any acceptable alternatives or trade-offs.

## Additional Context

Include references, screenshots, API examples, or deployment considerations.
